name: m01-intelligence
description: OctoBus package for the m01 mail security gateway local threat-intelligence APIs: IOC detection, paginated list, bulk add/update/delete, and statistics.

M01_Intelligence.M01_Intelligence/Detect.name: detect-intelligence
M01_Intelligence.M01_Intelligence/Detect.description: Query local threat intelligence for a batch of indicators.

M01_Intelligence.M01_Intelligence/ListIn.name: list-intelligence
M01_Intelligence.M01_Intelligence/ListIn.description: Paginated, filterable list of local threat intelligence.

M01_Intelligence.M01_Intelligence/Update.name: update-intelligence
M01_Intelligence.M01_Intelligence/Update.description: Bulk-update local threat intelligence by id.
